title: BPL - Client Side Mods (Complete)
description: Client mods for BPL MC Server. A exploration and building oriented modpack for multiplayer servers.
body:
This modpack consist of various optimization, structure generations and QOL mods. Mainly consists of mods that need to installed on client-side for multiplayer servers. Can be also used in singleplayer worlds.

Adds immersion using various sound based mods. Also includes various optimizations and QOL mods. 

Most QOL and non-opimization features work client-side without needing server-side installation.
